final:
module top_module(
   input [7:0] a,
   input [7:0] b,
   output reg [7:0] max_val
);always @(*) begin
   max_val = (a >= b) ? a : b;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (a == b) begin
        max_val <= a;
      end else begin
        max_val <= ~a & ~b;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
